prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数学 /统计类专业2024年热度评估为"推荐"，计算机类为"推荐"（67.80），师范/教育类为"分化观望"（55.84）；理科招生专业以数学类和理科试验班为主，整体专业热度偏正面；新疆2026年高考考生总数约23.8 万人（较2025年约7.65万人大幅增长约211%），按历史比例估算理科考生约16.3万人，考生规模急剧扩大将加剧优质高校的竞争烈度；北京师范大学（珠海校区）位于广东省珠海市，距新疆较远，但作为985高校的异地校区，近年报考热度持续上升；该校在新疆招生规模极小（理科仅4人），招生人数少导 致位次波动敏感度较高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) in Xinjiang Science 2025 minimum admission ranking approximately 1931, only using 2025 as a reference; the university's enrollment plan for Science in Xinjiang from 2021 to 2025 was 4 students, and the 2026 plan remains 4 students, with consecutive years of stable plans, no expansion or contraction signals, and unchanged competition base.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985, 211, Double First-Class university, ranked 19th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide; the Zhuhai Campus shares the main campus's level and reputation, continuously attracting candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the school refuting online misinformation, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity total ranking 37th (relatively hot), short video platform attention is at the upper-middle level, with no obvious signs of excessive or cold application; Beijing Normal University has A+ disciplines such as Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, and Marxist Theory, as well as A-level disciplines like Mathematics and Environmental Science and Engineering; the Zhuhai Campus offers Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) and Science Experimental Class (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Science, Chemistry), all corresponding to the main campus's advantageous disciplines, with strong appeal to Science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mathematics/Statistics majors in 2024 popularity evaluation as 'Recommended', Computer Science as 'Recommended' (67.80), Teacher Training/Education as 'Divergent Wait-and-See' (55.84); Science enrollment majors mainly Mathematics and Science Experimental Class, overall major popularity is positive; Xinjiang 2026 college entrance exam total candidates approximately 238,000 (a significant increase of about 211% from approximately 76,500 in 2025), estimated Science candidates about 163,000 based on historical proportion, the sharp increase in candidate scale will intensify competition for high-quality universities; Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is located in Zhuhai City, Guangdong Province, far from Xinjiang, but as a remote campus of a 985 university, application popularity has been rising in recent years; the university's enrollment scale in Xinjiang is very small (only 4 for Science), and the small number of enrollments leads to high sensitivity in ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as stable plans, significant increase in candidate scale, solid school level with neutral and stable reputation, and positive major popularity, competition in Xinjiang Science in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 1971, with a range of 1734–2208.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (includes majors
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Science only has 2 enrollment majors, Mathematics has historically better admission rankings than Science Experimental Class. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the predicted range (1734–2208) take Mathematics as the main sprint target and Science Experimental Class as a safe backup; candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<1734) can focus on sprinting for Mathematics; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (>2208) need to evaluate carefully.
